title: Retinispora filifera
taxonomy: Retinispora filifera is a species of fungus. It belongs to the family of fungi known as Leotiaceae. This family is part of the class Leotiomycetes, which is a group of ascomycete fungi. The class Leotiomycetes is further classified under the division Ascomycota. The Ascomycota is a division of fungi that are characterized by the production of ascospores.
